title: OR CFP Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q2 2025
content: In Q2 2025, Oregonâ€™s Clean Fuels Program (CFP) saw a 30.47% year-on-year decline (down 1.17% QoQ) in credits generated (excluding residential EV incremental credits). The credit bank declined for the third consecutive quarter as deficits exceeded credits. Deficits increased by 11.11% YoY (down 1.06% QoQ), totaling 819,639.
author: Tarana Ahmad
